title: Lapis Lazuli Harmony
description: Is lapis lazuli too useless for you? Do you need more blue blocks? Or just want some mod that adds more blocks? This mod is right for you! The mod will add a new merchant, lapis lazuli tools, armor and new lapis lazuli blocks.
body:
Is lapis lazuli too useless for you? Do you need more blue blocks? Or do you just want some kind of mod that adds more blocks? This mod is right for you! The mod will add a new merchant, lapis lazuli tools, armor and new lapis lazuli blocks

Now what GBT say about this mod?

Lapis lazuli fashion is an elegant and exquisite piece of jewelry that is designed to add chic and luxury to any look. Made of high quality lapis lazuli, it is perfect for both everyday use and special occasions. This mod will be a great addition to your style and emphasize your unique personality.
